sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξίστημι

- Transliteration: Existemi

- Phonetic: ex-is'-tay-mee

- Definition:

1. to throw out of position, displace

a. to amaze, to astonish, throw into wonderment

b. to be amazed, astounded

c. to be out of one's mind, besides one's self, insane

- Origin: from G1537 and G2476

- TDNT entry: 09:39,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G2476; to put (stand) out of wits that is astound or (reflexively) become astounded insane: - amaze be (make) astonished be beside self (selves) bewitch wonder.
